text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahh... Aw man, they're all here...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The guys from back home. Even though it's only a school event, it
looks like they've come all the way here to cheer me on...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What's more, they're all buddy-buddy now with the folks from the
local shopping district sitting next to them.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And their current topic of choice? Me. They're getting on like a house
on fire.
choice_data_list:
Sounds like the Nice Nature Fan Club is doing
well.

Sounds like the Nice Nature Fan Club is doing
well.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wha—et tu, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh maaan, you better not have any expectations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In spite of what Nature said, I see a flash of determination cross her
face as she enters the gate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And finally, the Tracen Meet kicks off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Nature and Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners have rounded the first turn! In fourth—Nice Nature!
Trailing behind in fifth by one and a half lengths is the fan
favorite—Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh, I'm already feeling the pressure! ...Even though I bet Teio isn't
even trying to do so!)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (But... I've got her exactly where I want her!)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... Time for me to go all-out!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Tokai Teio is making her move! She's blazing past the
competition in an instant!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Not good—Teio's in the zone! If I don't act now, she'll leave me in
the dust!)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Tch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature rejoins the pack, and she's got her sights locked on Tokai
Teio! Now for the final turn...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio! Tokai Teio leads the pack! Nice Nature in third! She's
speeding up and giving fierce chase!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio, leading by two lengths! Wait, make that two and
half—now three! There's no stopping her now... and she's past the
winning post!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio claims first place with a flashy finish!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Aw, I got real close today!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, third place isn't bad, right? Nothing to get down in the dumps
about.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: If anything, I'd say this is perfect for me. Yup, yup, this is just right.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Really... this is my limit, that's all—

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Sorry to interrupt. Is Nature here by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-yeah, why? You need something from me?

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: There was a delivery for you. Mind if I drop it off here?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The teacher brings in a large box. Opening it, we find the box filled
to the brim with letters addressed to Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: "Dear Natie..."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"You were great in today's race, as usual. It's a shame how it ended,
but to us, seeing you run is already more than we could ever ask for."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"Even when you're not here with us, talking about you always puts big
ol' smiles on our faces."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"Meeting you and watching you grow into such a fine Umamusume has
been the pleasure of our lives."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"We'll always be cheering you on, so don't forget to cheer yourself on
too."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What's... up with that?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What... What are they talking about? Smiles? Me? I'm not—
choice_data_list: In their eyes, you shined the brightest.
In their eyes, you shined the brightest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Aaaaargh! Augh! Ah, ngh!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: D... dammit! Dammit, dammit, damn it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What's up with me and third?! Every! Single! Time!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I tried my best? It was close? It wasn't that bad? There's no way that
third's all I'm good for!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I kept taking the easy way out, telling myself that I wasn't built for it,
that I was an extra! Wallowing in self pity to protect my petty pride!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to be disappointed—I didn't want to disappoint... I was
afraid of getting hurt again, so I tried to make everyone give up on
me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... but still!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I don't want things to end like this.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Everyone's cheering me on. Everyone's telling me that even I deserve to dream. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... want to make them proud. I want them to see me shine!
choice_data_list: I've been waiting to hear you say that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Ah, wait, um...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Agh... Gotta stop giving myself a way out. Once I start going down
that slippery slope...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for being all wishy-washy. It'll take some time before I can
muster up the courage to be more confident.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... well, you know. If you're still fine with training me, then—
choice_data_list: Alright, let's keep on giving it our best then!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You got it, Trainer!
